reasoning: The control 1.2.8 focuses on examining configuration files for network security configurations (NSCs) to ensure they meet specified security elements. In Kubernetes, this maps to ensuring that NetworkPolicies are configured to restrict ingress and egress traffic by default, preventing unauthorized access. Additionally, ensuring that services are not exposed using NodePort and that Ingress resources use TLS for secure communication aligns with the intent of restricting public access and securing data in transit.
title: Examine configuration files for NSCs to verify they are in accordance with all elements specified...
